textByHash.38a28dafeafc776b0e0d35095a04b1746beedf4b: All kinds! I don't want to keep eating the same food, even if I like it. I want to try new tastes!
textByHash.5c39ee375ed3a44160bbd269e1803305db8e1af6: That's all very well, but do you have anything edible?
textByHash.7baa87d3b5b9c2f097d9cc3a62ff4fda659799e4: Why not try something on me and see if I like it?
textByHash.839eecc97bae176386ac213e4391925277b5e9d1: Ooh, a surface-dweller! Have you got any exotic surface foods to sell?
textByHash.91be9934dc6f300d228df988ee799d8971c6c095: A pity. Dorgeshuun food seems so dull now I've tasted surface food.
textByHash.a96439a285ea4f7e762a2c32ce6cf55e52e3acb9: Splendid! Show me what you've got!
textByHash.c066a4ced8ff3ee9ef2735d6e25f99fe9f0a8272: What's the point of selling me Dorgeshuun foods? I want to experience exotic surface cuisine!
textByHash.ff7f80fcbd77de791bc0e24789fd18a24f8ebc7f: Eww! That looks disgusting! There's no way I'm buying that.
